mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PAGE_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE = 'VIEW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS VIEW_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE = 'CLICK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CLICK_COUNT FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE_VIEW_LOG WHERE EVENT_TYPE IN ('VIEW', 'CLICK') GROUP BY PAGE_ID ) s ON s.PAGE_ID = p.PAGE_ID

p.PAGE_ID AS pageId, p.PAGE_NAME AS pageName, p.VIEW_MODE AS viewMode, p.APPROVE_STATE AS approveState, p.IS_PUBLIC AS isPublic, p.CREATE_USER_NAME AS createUserName, TO_CHAR(p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS lastModifiedDtime, p.AB_GROUP_ID AS abGroupId, p.AB_WEIGHT AS abWeight, NVL(s.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS viewCount, NVL(s.CLICK_COUNT, 0) AS clickCount
p.PAGE_ID AS pageId, p.PAGE_NAME AS pageName, p.VIEW_MODE AS viewMode, p.IS_PUBLIC AS isPublic, p.CREATE_USER_NAME AS createUserName, p.AB_GROUP_ID AS abGroupId, p.AB_WEIGHT AS abWeight

WHERE p.USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED' AND p.IS_PUBLIC = 'Y'
AND p.PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE'
AND ( p.PAGE_ID LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' OR p.PAGE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' OR p.CREATE_USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' OR p.AB_GROUP_ID LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' )

choose.when: ORDER BY p.PAGE_NAME ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.AB_GROUP_ID NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.VIEW_MODE ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.PAGE_NAME
ORDER BY p.CREATE_USER_NAME ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.PAGE_NAME
ORDER BY p.AB_GROUP_ID ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.PAGE_NAME
ORDER BY p.AB_WEIGHT ${orderDir} NULLS LAST, p.PAGE_NAME
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY p.AB_GROUP_ID NULLS LAST, p.PAGE_NAME

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE p
WHERE p.USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED' AND p.IS_PUBLIC = 'Y' AND p.PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE' AND p.AB_GROUP_ID IS NOT NULL
AND ( p.PAGE_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR p.PAGE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR p.CREATE_USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR p.AB_GROUP_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
ORDER BY p.AB_GROUP_ID NULLS LAST, p.PAGE_NAME

SELECT
FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE p WHERE p.USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED' AND p.IS_PUBLIC = 'Y' AND p.PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE'
AND ( p.PAGE_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR p.PAGE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR p.CREATE_USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR p.AB_GROUP_ID LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
ORDER BY p.AB_GROUP_ID NULLS LAST, p.PAGE_NAME

SELECT p.PAGE_ID AS pageId, p.PAGE_NAME AS pageName, p.VIEW_MODE AS viewMode, p.IS_PUBLIC AS isPublic, p.AB_WEIGHT AS abWeight, NVL(s.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS viewCount, NVL(s.CLICK_COUNT, 0) AS clickCount FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE p
WHERE p.AB_GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND p.USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE' ORDER BY p.AB_WEIGHT DESC NULLS LAST, p.PAGE_NAME
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE AB_GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED' AND IS_PUBLIC = 'Y' AND PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE' AND PAGE_ID IN
#{pageId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND AB_GROUP_ID IS NOT NULL AND AB_GROUP_ID != #{groupId} AND PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE' AND PAGE_ID IN
#{pageId}
mapper.update: UPDATE SPW_CMS_PAGE SET AB_GROUP_ID = #{groupId}, AB_WEIGHT = #{weight}, LAST_MODIFIER_ID = #{modifierId} WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE' AND (AB_GROUP_ID IS NULL OR AB_GROUP_ID = #{groupId})
UPDATE SPW_CMS_PAGE SET AB_GROUP_ID = NULL, AB_WEIGHT = NULL, LAST_MODIFIER_ID = #{modifierId} WHERE AB_GROUP_ID = #{groupId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE'
UPDATE SPW_CMS_PAGE SET AB_GROUP_ID = NULL, AB_WEIGHT = NULL, LAST_MODIFIER_ID = #{modifierId} WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PAGE_TYPE = 'PAGE' AND AB_GROUP_ID IS NOT NULL
